The plant Senecio is a genus of flowering plants in the daisy family, Asteraceae. Some species of Senecio, such as Senecio telphusiformis, are used in traditional medicine for their health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Senecio species include sesquiterpene lactones, phenolic acids, and flavonoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Senecio species are teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
